messages.text: A searing brand of holy light sinks into you, burning away your guard.
A searing brand of holy light scorches itself into {name}.
The radiant brand flares and sears at your flesh.
The radiant brand cools and its holy fire gutters out.
The radiant brand searing {name} cools and fades.
{name} is marked by a searing, radiant brand of holy light.
